# Admin theme vendor assets

Vendored from the reference `vue-admin-design` theme (Bootstrap horizontal layout).

These files are **owned by this repo** so the app does not depend on `vue-admin-design/` at build or deploy time.

Contents:
- `scss/` — theme styles (`core.scss` and partials)
- `js/` — `helpers.js`, `menu.js`, `dropdown-hover.js`
- `fonts/iconify/` — Tabler icon CSS used by admin UI

Do not edit generated icon CSS by hand; replace the file if the icon set changes.
